purpose: Prevent absolute W/Z mass projection from using an unsupported or target-contaminated GeV scale.

requiredBridgeEvidence.requirement: names the computed internal observable that connects a selected scale source to internal-mass-unit
declares a replayable derivation method rather than a hand-entered scale
propagates both source uncertainty and internal bridge uncertainty

hardRejectConditions: scale source is a weighted fit that includes W or Z masses
bridge observable is missing or has unestimated uncertainty
promotionOutputsAfterBridgePasses: physical_observable_mappings.json entries for physical-w-boson-mass-gev and physical-z-boson-mass-gev
physical_calibrations.json entries with a shared selected scale source
observables.json entries for projected absolute W and Z masses
target comparison report generated after projection
